description: Specifies the maximum number of visible rows in a tracetable. When the row count exceeds this limit, the oldest row is removed, keeping only the most recent N entries.
utility: Limit tracetable to show only the last N rows

arguments.name: size
arguments.description: Maximum number of rows to display. Must be a positive integer.

alternates.description: Keep the last 10 data points visible
Keep only the last 5 entries for a compact view

examples.expression: tt = tracetable(at(10, 6), slidingwindow(5), field(angle_1, 'degrees', "θ°"), field(angle_1, 'sin', "sin θ"), field(angle_1, 'cos', "cos θ"))

notes: Used exclusively inside tracetable() — not a standalone expression
If omitted from tracetable(), defaults to 10
The window applies to rows — all field columns are sampled together as one row
